description: Phase 002 of the 008 rerank-sidecar arc. Build the new system-rerank-sidecar skill: dedicated Python HTTP service hosting Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B via sentence-transformers CrossEncoder. Sigmoid-normalized output, asyncio.Lock serialization, /health + /warmup + /rerank endpoints, bounded warmup, clean SIGTERM. Independent infrastructure shared by spec-memory and cocoindex.
